scripts.generate: node scripts/gen-3d-dice.cjs && node scripts/gen-icon-variants.cjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('public/icon-preview-3d-192.png','public/pwa-192.png');fs.copyFileSync('public/icon-preview-3d-512.png','public/pwa-512.png');console.log('PWA icons -> 3D dice ✓');"
